{{Quote|Dreadnaught ''Parjai'', return the captures to the South Orbital Area for processing. You, too, ''Gratua''. I don't have all day.|Cassus Fett|<ref name="KotOR23:KoS2" />}}
Located in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris's]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]],<ref name="KotOR23:KoS2" /> the '''South Orbital Area''' was a [[Staging area/Legends|staging area]] used around [[3963 BBY]] by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Neo-Crusader]] warriors during their [[Taris Siege|siege]] of the world as part of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-wide [[Mandalorian Wars]]. During the siege, two aerial, [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droid]]–riding Neo-Crusader patrols directed the [[Pelagia Duplex Command Assault Gunship|gunship]] ''[[Moomo Williwaw]]'' to be taken to the staging area.<ref name="KotOR22:KoS1" />

The [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] passengers, including [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Zayne Carrick]], were attempting to meet with the [[Taris Resistance|local resistance]] and did not want to be discovered by the Mandalorians. [[Demagol]], a rogue Mandalorian accompanying Carrick under false pretenses, was [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] the ''Williwaw'' and convinced the patrols that the ship did need not to be diverted by feigning ignorance as a Mandalorian drafted from the front lines and unfamiliar with local operations.<ref name="KotOR22:KoS1" /> Later, the leader of Taris's Neo-Crusader forces at the [[Old Republic era|time]], [[Cassus Fett]], ordered the [[Kandosii-type dreadnaught|''Kandosii''-type dreadnaughts]] ''[[Parjai]]'' and ''[[Gratua]]'' to also take<ref name="KotOR23:KoS2" /> starships<ref name="KotOR22:KoS1" /> captured by the Mandalorians to the South Orbital Area.<ref name="KotOR23:KoS2" />

==Behind the scenes==
The staging area was first indirectly mentioned in the [[Knights of the Old Republic 22|twenty-second issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, which was written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="KotOR22:KoS1" /> on [[November 7]], [[2007]].<ref name="Release22">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54341/star_wars_knights_of_the_old_republic_2006_22|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (2006) #22}}</ref> It was first identified as the South Orbital Area in the series' [[Knights of the Old Republic 23|following issue]], which was also written by Miller<ref name="KotOR23:KoS2" /> and published on [[November 28]] of the same year.<ref name="Release23">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54342/star_wars_knights_of_the_old_republic_2006_23|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (2006) #23}}</ref>
